title: cast(interval second value to int or decimal) is wrong (by a factor of 1000), cast(interval month value to decimal or floating point) fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_1 (f1 interval second NOT NULL);
SELECT f1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM f1)::int AS f1_int, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM f1)::decimal(10,5) AS f1_decimal, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM f1)::real AS f1_real FROM INTERVAL_TBL_1;
CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1 interval month CHECK (f1 >= INTERVAL '0 months'));
key_bug_features: casting interval second or month values to numeric types
